creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Trying to install neomutt results in this:

trasz@v2:~ % doas pkg install neomutt
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up to date.
All repositories are up to date.
The following 6 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        neomutt: 20180716_4
        talloc: 2.2.0
        notmuch: 0.29.1
        gmime30: 3.2.0_1
        xapian-core: 1.4.11,1
        tokyocabinet: 1.4.48

Number of packages to be installed: 6

The process will require 24 MiB more space.
5 MiB to be downloaded.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
[1/6] Fetching neomutt-20180716_4.txz: 100%    1 MiB   1.4MB/s    00:01    
[2/6] Fetching talloc-2.2.0.txz: 100%   48 KiB  49.4kB/s    00:01

[4/6] Fetching gmime30-3.2.0_1.txz: 100%  366 KiB 187.3kB/s    00:02    
[5/6] Fetching xapian-core-1.4.11,1.txz: 100%    2 MiB 378.3kB/s    00:05    
[6/6] Fetching tokyocabinet-1.4.48.txz: 100%  998 KiB 255.5kB/s    00:04    
Checking integrity... done (1 conflicting)
  - talloc-2.2.0 conflicts with talloc1-2.1.14 on /usr/local/include/talloc.h
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
Conflicts with the existing packages have been found.
One more solver iteration is needed to resolve them.
The following 8 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        talloc: 2.2.0
        gmime30: 3.2.0_1
        xapian-core: 1.4.11,1
        notmuch: 0.29.1
        tokyocabinet: 1.4.48
        neomutt: 20180716_4

Number of packages to be installed: 6

The process will require 24 MiB more space.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
